overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy character walking along a dirt trail through a grassy mountain valley with snow-capped peaks in the background. The character encounters and passes three horse-drawn wagons during the journey as the terrain gradually transitions from open grassland to rockier sections.

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a dirt trail through a wide-open grassy valley with tall pine trees flanking the path and snow-capped mountains in the distance. A horse-drawn covered wagon appears ahead and passes by on the right side of the trail.

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking through the valley as the landscape remains consistent with grassy hills and distant mountains. A second horse-drawn wagon approaches from ahead and passes by on the right.

segments.scene_description: The journey continues along the winding dirt trail with the same mountainous backdrop. A third horse-drawn wagon appears in the distance and passes by on the right side of the trail.

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a more rugged section of the trail where rocky outcrops appear on the left and a distinctive dead tree stands on the right. The terrain shifts from open grassland to rockier ground as the journey continues toward the distant mountains.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey along a dirt trail through a wide mountain valley that gradually shifts from open grassland to a more rugged, rocky terrain. It begins with the character walking past tall pine trees and snow-capped peaks as a horse-drawn covered wagon passes by on the right. As the character continues forward through the consistent landscape of grassy hills, a second wagon approaches from ahead and passes in the same manner. The scene then maintains its steady pace along the winding trail, passing a third distant wagon before the environment begins to transform. Finally, the terrain opens into a more rugged section where rocky outcrops emerge on the left and a distinctive dead tree stands on the right, marking the transition toward the distant mountains.
